chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Sanctity and Virtue of Medina

text: 3153 - وَ سَأَلَهُ يُونُسُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ قَالَ : يَحْرُمُ عَلَيَّ فِي حَرَمِ رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ مَا يَحْرُمُ عَلَيَّ فِي حَرَمِ اَللَّهِ تَعَالَى قَالَ «لاَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3153 - Yunus ibn Ya’qub asked Imam (as):
"Is what is prohibited for me in the sanctuary of the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) the same as what is prohibited for me in the sanctuary of Allah (swt), the Exalted?"
Imam (as) replied: "No."
